news.t: Global X Launches a New Active Fund Strategy to Provide Investment-Grade Corporate Bond Exposure

overview.description: The Global X Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF (GXIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking a high level of total return through a portfolio of investment grade corporate bonds of any maturity. Securities selected will be from US issuers, however, up to 35% may be from foreign issuers. GXIG was launched on Jun 16, 2025 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Launches a New Active Fund Strategy to Provide Investment-Grade Corporate Bond Exposure
data.text: GXIG seeks to provide exposure to a basket of high-quality investment-grade corporate bonds, delivered through the convenience and liquidity of an ETF NEW YORK , June 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X...
